name: Hegemony Environment Trees Runtime Family

authorization.integrationInstruction: On 2026-07-18, the Warpkeep project owner supplied Warpkeep_Trees_Runtime_Bundle_2026-07-18.zip and instructed a new draft PR to integrate the supplied tree assets into natural, varied forest and open-biome presentation.
authorization.scope: This records use authorization for the exact digest-pinned tree GLBs in the public Warpkeep GitHub repository and an eventual official warpkeep.com Pages runtime after separately approved deployment. It is use authorization only, not merge or deployment approval.
authorization.limitations: Delivery does not establish underlying ownership, a separate public/open-content licence, general derivative or redistribution rights, trademark rights, GLB-derived authoritative placement, collision, resource, reward, or SpacetimeDB authority.

runtimeContract.lodSelection: projected-height; High at or above 160px, Balanced at or above 64px, Compact at or above 16px, cull below 8px unless a reviewed presentation layer applies a more conservative cap.
runtimeContract.rendering: Every exact GLB is one opaque, double-sided material and one triangle primitive with COLOR_0 vertex colors, KHR_materials_specular, no embedded images, no external URIs, no animation, and no camera.
runtimeContract.pivot: trunk-base at world origin; place with a private terrain-contact wrapper only. Some authored bounds dip slightly below Y=0, so permit a bounded ground-contact tolerance but never rewrite the immutable GLB.
runtimeContract.collision: Visual presentation must not source game authority or render-triangle collision. The species manifests retain trunk-only recommendations; the legacy Regular Tree family has no authorized runtime collision.
runtimeContract.randomization: Presentation may deterministically vary Y rotation 0-360 degrees and uniform scale 0.9-1.1. Keep species/biome weights deterministic from caller seed; do not use model geometry to create authoritative map state.
runtimeContract.sourceManifestDiscrepancy: The 16 species-library source manifests state rendering.doubleSided=false, but every decoded supplied GLB has material.doubleSided=true. The public runtime family preserves exact supplied GLB bytes; decoded GLB structure is authoritative for renderer-facing material behavior.

collision.policy: presentation-only; no runtime collision is authorized for the legacy Regular Tree family
presentation-only; no runtime collision is authorized for the legacy Regular Tree family

scopeBoundary: This runtime family is visual-only. The immutable GLB geometry never determines canonical placement, collision, navigation, resources, rewards, or any game authority. A separately authored and server-validated public realm_forest_layout_v1 / realm_forest_instance_v1 projection may persist one exact digest-pinned Genesis visual catalog of allowed asset IDs and fixed transforms; model LOD only changes visual detail. Canonical map cells, ownership, movement, collision, resource nodes, collection, balances, rewards, schedules, and all gameplay state remain governed solely by separately reviewed SpacetimeDB authority code.
